indication: KEYTRUDA is a programmed death receptor-1 (PD-1)-blocking antibody indicated as a single agent for the first-line treatment of patients with metastatic or with unresectable, recurrent HNSCC whose tumors express PD-L1 [Combined Positive Score (CPS) >=1] as determined by an FDA-approved test.
description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to pembrolizumab for the first-line treatment of patients with metastatic or with unresectable, recurrent head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (HNSCC) whose tumors express PD-L1 [Combined Positive Score (CPS) >=1] as determined by an FDA-approved test.

document.name: Keytruda (pembrolizumab) [package insert]. FDA.
